steps.title: Read the vertex from vertex form
steps.content: $y=-16(x-5.6)^2+502$ is in vertex form $a(x-h)^2+k$, so $(h,k)=(5.6,502)$ directly — no algebra needed.

steps.title: Interpret the vertex
steps.content: Since $a=-16\lt0$, the parabola opens downward — the vertex is the maximum. The rocket reaches its maximum height of $502$ ft at $t=5.6$ seconds. That matches choice B — B is correct.
